deck: Fresh from the World Economic Forum Annual Meeting in Davos, Dimagi co-founder Jonathan Jackson shares candid reflections on the biggest problems we face and the biggest bets we need to make to create a better world.
seo_description: Jonathan Jackson shares candid reflections from the World Economic Forum in Davos, on the biggest problems we face and the bets needed for a better world.
og_description: Jonathan Jackson's candid reflections from Davos on our biggest problems and the bets we need for a better world.
about: Returning from the World Economic Forum Annual Meeting in Davos, Dimagi co-founder Jonathan Jackson sits down to share his candid reflections and takeaways from the gathering.

Through the lens of a social entrepreneur, Jonathan offers his stance on some of the biggest problems we are facing today, and on the biggest bets he believes we need to make to create a better world.
bullets: Reflections from Davos: candid takeaways from the World Economic Forum Annual Meeting
A social entrepreneur's lens on the conversations and priorities shaping the global agenda
The biggest problems we are facing today, as Jonathan sees them
The biggest bets we need to make to create a better world
Advocating for frontline workers on a global stage
